notes: B2-format liquid-toner (LEP) press. 120K announced at drupa 2024 as successor with same mechanical speed plus automation; 100K remained available per Printweek (Dec 2024).
Dry EA toner. Offered at 90/120/150 ppm; 150 variant recorded. Optional 5th station adds Orange/Green/Blue gamut-extension or White/Clear/Fluorescent Yellow dry inks.
Dry toner with Red VCSEL imaging. iF Design Award 2024 (imagePRESS V family). Successor lineage to imagePRESS C-series.
Dry Simitri V toner. Publicly previewed at PRINTING United Oct 2019, official launch Feb 2020. Later refreshed as C14000e; base C14000 recorded here.

configuration: 4-drum; Fiery DFE; Productivity Upgrade Kit for 135ppm
notes: Dry PxP polymerised chemical toner, 4-drum dry electrostatic transfer with internal transfer belt, oil-less belt fusing, VCSEL imaging.

configuration: Full Width Array; EX-4100 Fiery DFE
notes: Dry EA low-melt toner. Light/mid production tier (100 ppm A4). Optional Adaptive CMYK+ kit adds gold/silver/white/clear/fluorescent specialty toners.
